title: LibraryAnalyticsActionsByTeam
description: Library analytics action data broken down by team.

week.description: The date in ISO 8601 format. e.g. 2023-12-13

teamName.description: The name of the team using the library.

workspaceName.description: The name of the workspace that the team belongs to.

detachments.description: The number of detach events for this period.

insertions.description: The number of insertion events for this period.
